title: Senior Software Engineer - Netsol Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Netsol Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Netsol Technologies:
Netsol Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies!
